description: A fresh take on the popular puma vulcanized shoe, the Suede Archive NM were first released in 1968. A great addition to your wardrobe, these shoes come with luxurious suede uppers offering a great Fit and comfort. Team these with jeans and polo t-shirts for those casual Fridays at work.UpperPremium suede leather upper for comfort and durabilityPerforations on the sides for breathabilityLightly padded collar for comfortStitch overlays to further add to the structure and enhance durabilityUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilitySynthetic formstripe logo detailMidsoleSynthetic lining with a cushioned footbed provides all-day comfortOutsoleGum-rubber outsole for cushioning and grip
